zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Lavenham於1256年出生在英國英格蘭戴文。她於1268年與Peter de Middleton在英國英格蘭越可爾米德萊頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1299年在英國英格蘭享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Lavenham于1256年出生在英国英格兰戴文。她于1268年与Peter de Middleton在英国英格兰越可爾米德萊頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1299年在英国英格兰享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Lavenham was born in 1256, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. She married Peter de Middleton in 1268, in Middleton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1299, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Lavenham est née en 1256, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Peter de Middleton en 1268, à Middleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1299, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Lavenham wurde 1256 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1268 in Middleton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Peter de Middleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1299 im Alter von 43 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Lavenham è nata il nel 1256 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Peter de Middleton nel 1268, nel Middleton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1299, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Lavenhamは1256年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた。1268年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレトンでPeter de Middletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1299年にイギリスイギリスで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Lavenham(은)는 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1268년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 미들레턴에서 Peter de Middleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1299년 영국 잉글랜드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Lavenham nasceu em 1256, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Peter de Middleton em 1268, em Middleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1299, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Lavenham родилась в 1256 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter de Middleton в 1268 г. в местности миддлетон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1299 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes Lavenham nació en 1256, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Peter de Middleton en 1268, en Middleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1299, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
